Uses of Class
batch.BatchConfiguration

  • Packages that use BatchConfiguration 
    Package Description
    batch
    Provides the core orchestration logic for batch-processing media metadata.

    • Uses of BatchConfiguration in batch

      Fields in batch declared as BatchConfiguration 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private BatchConfiguration MetadataScanner.config 
      private BatchConfiguration MediaMetadataConsole.config 
      private BatchConfiguration MediaBatchProcessor.config 
      Methods in batch that return BatchConfiguration 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      BatchConfiguration BatchBuilder.buildConfig()
      Validates the current configuration and returns an immutable BatchConfiguration snapshot.
      Constructors in batch with parameters of type BatchConfiguration 
      Constructor Description
      DisplayMetadata(BatchConfiguration config)
      Creates an instance for displaying metadata name/value attributes, similar to the output format produced by exiftool -G1 -a -s -u.
      MediaBatchProcessor(BatchConfiguration config)
      Constructs a batch processor using the specified configuration.
      MediaMetadataConsole(BatchConfiguration config)
      Constructs a console instance using a validated configuration.
      MetadataScanner(BatchConfiguration settings)
      Constructs a scanner using the specified batch configuration.
